goals.title: Stabilize runtime review boundary
goals.description: Keep the public slice read-only, fixture-backed, and reproducible.

goals.title: Expose route telemetry
goals.description: Show recent routing quality and degradation alerts without leaking private core details.

recentLearnings: Route alerts rise when degraded outcomes exceed half of recent events.
Runtime log semantics remain stable after path redaction.
Fixture-backed readiness snapshots keep the UI deterministic.
alerts: Generation, chat, and web research are intentionally excluded from this slice.
